## Summary

What does this PR do? One or two sentences.

## Why

What problem does it solve? Link to the issue if there is one.

## How

Brief design notes if the change isn't obvious from the diff.

## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all -- --check` passes
- [ ] `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings` passes
- [ ] `cargo test --workspace -- --test-threads=1` passes
- [ ] New tests cover the change
- [ ] Docs updated (README, module-level doc comments, CHANGELOG if relevant)

## Breaking changes?

If yes, explain what breaks and why.
